info.title: BharatAI API
info.description: India's AI-powered academic opportunity intelligence platform

post.description: Creates a new student account with email and password. Returns JWT tokens.
Returns JWT access and refresh tokens on successful authentication.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token + refresh token pair (rotation).

post.summary: Logout and revoke current access token

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's core account fields (id, name, email, role, college, degree, year). For extended profile data (bio, skills, interests, social links) use `GET /api/v1/profile`.

put.description: Lightweight profile patch — prefer `PUT /api/v1/profile` for full profile management. This endpoint is kept for backward compatibility.

post.description: Upload a PDF resume (max 5 MB). The file is validated for MIME type and size before storage. After upload, the AI autofill pipeline extracts skills, education, and experience automatically.

422.description: File is not a PDF or exceeds 5 MB

get.summary: Get full profile with embedding status

get.description: Cursor-paginated, filterable list of opportunities. Supports domain, deadline, institution, and keyword filters.

parameters.name: before_deadline

schema.description: Opportunities with deadline before this date
schema.title: Before Deadline

parameters.description: Opportunities with deadline before this date

get.description:
Returns a ranked list of opportunities tailored to the current user's profile, skills, interests, and past engagement.

**Ranking factors:** interest embedding similarity, skill keyword match, application history, deadline urgency.

**Cold start:** If the user has no profile data, returns the most recent active opportunities unsorted.

**Caching:** Results are cached in Redis (TTL: 5 min) and the response includes `cached: true` when served from cache.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of opportunities to return (1–100)
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of opportunities to return (1–100)

post.description: Create a new application for an opportunity. Students only. One application per opportunity.

get.description: List the current user's applications, optionally filtered by status.

put.description: Update the status of an application. Enforces a valid state machine: draft→submitted, submitted→accepted/rejected, draft/submitted→withdrawn. Admin can update any application; students can only update their own.

get.description: Returns a checklist of preparation steps based on the opportunity's eligibility text.
Returns form field suggestions from the user's profile. Requires consent_to_autofill=true on profile. Rate-limited to 20 requests/hour.

schema.title: Response List Posts Api V1 Community Posts Get
Response List Comments Api V1 Community Posts  Post Id  Comments Get
Response List Groups Api V1 Community Groups Get
Response Group Feed Api V1 Community Groups  Group Id  Feed Get
Response List Achievements Api V1 Community Achievements Get

get.description: Returns the current user's notifications, newest first. Use `unread_only=true` to show only unread items. Supports `limit`/`offset` pagination.

parameters.name: unread_only

schema.description: If true, return only unread notifications
schema.title: Unread Only

parameters.description: If true, return only unread notifications

schema.title: Response List Notifications Api V1 Notifications Get

get.description: Returns the number of unread notifications for the notification bell badge.

post.description: Marks a single notification as read. Returns 404 if the notification does not belong to the current user.
Bulk-marks every unread notification for the current user as read in a single operation.

type.title: Type
type.description: hackathon | internship | publication | competition | certification | coding | community | other
